level_signals: 3-4 years of top tier investment banking / investing experience OR 2-3 years of top tier consulting experience
Described as 'intermediate level individual contributor role'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 3-4 years of top tier investment banking / investing experience, ideally with a focus on software, technology, or digital infrastructure
OR Have 2-3 years of top tier consulting experience, ideally with a focus on software / technology; further experience in BizOps, product, or investing is also valued
Have some technical background (e.g., CS, EE, Applied Math, or related undergraduate degree, software engineering internships)
Are a clear communicator with a high-ownership mentality and bias to action
Are a problem solver: can operate at a level 4-5 on this hierarchy

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: further experience in BizOps, product, or investing is also valued

scope.surface: Strategy & Business Operations — strategy, corporate development, and cross-functional projects
primary_metrics_inferred: Pricing and packaging optimization (revenue and margin)
core_responsibilities: Influence strategic decision-making by collaborating with and building consensus among leaders across the organization, including product, GTM, and research and engineering
Optimize pricing and packaging, ensuring that the company's offerings are both attractive to customers and profitable
Build financial models and analyses to evaluate new and existing opportunities
Contribute to corporate development activities: fundraising, strategic partnerships, investor relations, M&A, etc.
Conduct market and competitive analysis to anticipate and respond to emerging trends and to identify new opportunities for innovation and growth

green_flags: Clear seniority level stated ('intermediate level individual contributor role')
Two equivalent experience paths offered (banking/investing OR consulting), lowering barrier to entry
Encourages applications even if experience doesn't line up perfectly
Diverse office presence across Toronto, New York, San Francisco, London, Paris with remote flexibility
Strong benefits package: 6 weeks vacation, full health/dental, 100% parental leave top-up
Cutting-edge AI company with stated mission and strong brand
red_flags: Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
'Top tier' employer requirement for prior experience is subjective and potentially exclusionary
Reference to 'level 4-5 on this hierarchy' is an internal framework not explained in the JD — ambiguous signal for applicants

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'intermediate level individual contributor' phrasing and years ranges)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description: enterprise AI platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'remote-flexible' language and US office cities listed)
equity_mentioned set to false (not referenced in JD; benefits listed do not mention equity)
ambiguities: The two experience paths (3-4 years IB/investing OR 2-3 years consulting) are presented with 'OR', making it unclear which is the primary expectation; both are listed as must_haves but either path suffices.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not addressed anywhere in the JD.
'Remote-flexible' is ambiguous — could mean fully remote or hybrid with optional office use; treated as hybrid.
The 'level 4-5 on this hierarchy' reference links to an unnamed external or internal framework, making this requirement unverifiable from the JD alone.
